title: Epileson
description: Adds an endgame upgrade for Chainmail Armor.
body:
# Epileson
Epileson is a mod that adds an end themed upgrade for Chainmail Armor, Epileson, derived from Epilogue and Gambeson.

The armor provides the same protection value as Chainmail but has armor toughness and reduces velocity based damage.

## Works Well with Origins!
The mod is designed for Origins, to give something in place of Elytra for Origins such as the Elytrian origin, but can still be played without Origins.

![](https://img.merchantpug.net/u/Xfqlex.png)
![](https://img.merchantpug.net/u/UlqwPq.png)

## How to obtain Epileson and what to do with it?
Epileson has two parts to it, the Epileson Upgrade Smithing Template, and the Epileson Sheet.
The Epileson Upgrade Smithing Template has a mild chance to spawn in any End City chest loot.

The Epileson Sheet can be crafted with the following recipe...
![](https://img.merchantpug.net/u/kcWvZ0.png)

The Epileson Sheet can be crafted with any Chainmail Armor piece and an Epileson Upgrade Smithing Template to create a respective Epileson Armor piece.
![](https://img.merchantpug.net/u/MpC9GR.png)

## Downloads
The mod is available for:
- [Fabric/Quilt (1.20 and above)](https://modrinth.com/mod/epileson/versions?l=fabric)
- [Forge (1.20.1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/epileson/versions?l=forge)
- [NeoForge (1.20.4 and above)](https://modrinth.com/mod/epileson/versions?l=neoforge)

## Credits
- Omniv for making the textures.
